stemHtml:
Refer to figure.
Which of these statements about the pitching moment coefficient versus angle of attack lines in the annex is correct?

options.a: In its curved part at high angles of attack line 2 illustrates increasing static longitudinal stability.
options.b: Static longitudinal stability is greater at line 3 when compared with line 4 at low and moderate angles of attack.
options.c: The CG position is further aft at line 4 when compared with line 1.
options.d: The horizontal part of line 2 illustrates static longitudinal instability.
